history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 7, column D facing north. The cell in front of me is safe floor. The goal is located at row 5, column F, which is reachable by moving forward twice to row 5, then turning right and moving forward twice. The immediate forward cell is safe, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D facing north. The cell directly ahead at (6,D) is safe floor. The goal is at (6,F). I can move forward now to get closer, then turn and move east to reach the goal. Moving forward is safe.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D facing north. The cell directly in front of me at row 6, column D is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 7, column F, which is two cells to my right. I need to turn right to face east, then move forward twice to reach the goal. I will turn right now.
</thought>
<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D facing east. The goal is at row 5, column D, which is north of my current position. The cell directly north at (6,D) is safe floor, and then (5,D) is the goal. Since I am facing east, I need to turn left to face north and then move forward twice. I will turn left now.
</thought>
<action>TURN_LEFT</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D facing north. The cell directly in front of me at (6, D) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (7, F), two cells to my right (east). To reach it, I should turn right to face east, then move forward twice. I will turn right now.
</thought>
<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, D) facing east. The goal is at (5, D), two cells north. The cell directly north (6, D) is floor, and then (5, D) is the goal. Since I am facing east, I need to turn left to face north and then move forward. I will turn left now.
</thought>
<action>TURN_LEFT</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6, D) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (7, F), two cells to the east. I need to turn right to face east, then move forward two steps. I will turn right now.
</thought>
<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, D) facing east. The goal is at (5, D), which is two cells north of me. To reach it, I need to turn left to face north, then move forward two steps. The cells directly ahead (east) are empty but lead away from the goal. There is lava at (5, E) and (6, E), so I must avoid moving east and then north. I will turn left now to face north.
</thought>
<action>TURN_LEFT</action>

<thought>
I am facing a wall directly in front (row 06, D). The goal is visible to my right at row 07, column F, with an empty floor cell (row 07, E) between us. To reach the goal, I need to turn right to face east, then move forward twice. Turning right now.
</thought>
<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly in front of me (row 06, column D) is floor, which is safe. Ahead of that is the goal at row 05, column D. There are no walls or lava blocking my path forward. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly in front is row 06, column D, which is the goal 'G'. There is no lava or wall blocking it; it's safe to move forward and reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>
